name: CrowdMix
overview: A better Instant Mix powered by real listening-crowd similarity (Last.fm), not just audio.
description: CrowdMix replaces Jellyfin's native Instant Mix with recommendations sourced from a real listening population via the Last.fm API. It matches local tracks to the catalog, pulls similar tracks and artists, intersects with owned music, and re-ranks by your Jellyfin play history and tag overlap. Unmatched tracks fall back to the native mix.
